parsed.explanation: I fixed two XML structural errors: (1) In the first <BIBL> entry, there was an extra closing </TITLE> tag without a matching opening tag; I removed that unmatched closing tag and kept the descriptive text as plain content within <BIBL>. (2) In the second <BIBL> entry, the same issue occurred (an extra </TITLE> after plain descriptive text); I removed that unmatched closing tag. All other tags appear properly nested and closed. I did not normalize historical spelling or character encoding artifacts, since the request was to fix XML/tag faults.
